content:
Here's the Next.js project structure for barbershopChuLun:

```
.claude
.claude/settings.local.json
eslint.config.mjs
.git
.gitignore
.next
next.config.ts
next-env.d.ts
node_modules
package.json
package-lock.json
postcss.config.mjs
public
public/file.svg
public/globe.svg
public/manifest.json
public/next.svg
public/vercel.svg
public/window.svg
README.md
src
src/app
src/app/favicon.ico
src/app/globals.css
src/app/layout.tsx
src/app/page.tsx
src/components
src/components/about-section.tsx
src/components/academy-section.tsx
src/components/booking-modal.tsx
src/components/branches-section.tsx
src/components/contact-section.tsx
src/components/floating-actions.tsx
src/components/footer.tsx
src/components/header.tsx
src/components/hero-section.tsx
src/components/mobile-bottom-nav.tsx
src/components/pricing-section.tsx
src/components/products-section.tsx
src/components/youtube-section.tsx
src/data
src/data/site-data.ts
tsconfig.json
```

**Key files and components:**

- **src/app/layout.tsx**: Main layout and metadata
- **src/app/page.tsx**: Homepage with sections
- **src/components**: Reusable UI components
- **src/data/site-data.ts**: Static site data (navigation, services, etc.)
- **public/manifest.json**: PWA manifest
- **eslint.config.mjs**: ESLint configuration
- **postcss.config.mjs**: PostCSS/Tailwind configuration
- **tsconfig.json**: TypeScript configuration

The project uses Next.js 16.1.6, React 19.2.3, and Tailwind CSS for styling. Key features include:

- IntersectionObserver-based animations
- Responsive design with mobile navigation
- Booking modal with form validation
- Dynamic sections for services, branches, etc.
- PWA features via manifest.json

The code follows a component-based architecture with TypeScript and ESLint for type safety and code quality.
